message:
fix: add cache-buster to OG image URL for X card refresh

X's crawler caches card metadata aggressively. If the link was
shared before the image was deployed, X cached "no image" and
won't re-fetch. Adding ?v=2 query parameter forces X to treat
this as a new image URL and re-scrape.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 <meta property="og:type" content="website">
 <meta property="og:title" content="Asupersync — Interactive WASM Demo">
 <meta property="og:description" content="Structured concurrency, cancel-correct channels, four-valued outcomes, and deterministic testing — compiled to WebAssembly and running live in your browser.">
-<meta property="og:image" content="https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/assets/og-share-image.png">
+<meta property="og:image" content="https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/assets/og-share-image.png?v=2">
 <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
 <meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
 <meta property="og:image:type" content="image/png">
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@
 <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
 <meta name="twitter:title" content="Asupersync — Interactive WASM Demo">
 <meta name="twitter:description" content="Spec-first, cancel-correct async for Rust. 21 live exhibits running real WASM — structured concurrency, cancel protocol, chaos testing, live REPL.">
-<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/assets/og-share-image.png">
+<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/assets/og-share-image.png?v=2">
 <meta name="twitter:image:alt" content="Asupersync Interactive WASM Demo — 21 live exhibits demonstrating structured concurrency, cancel-correct channels, and four-valued outcomes">
 <script type="importmap">
 {
